bids.reasoning: At the start of the negotiation (t=0.0), the opponent's initial offer provides very low utility for me, as most values are at their lowest utility level according to my preferences. The opponent seems to be holding firm with negligible concessions, as they continue to offer low-utility values. Their message history also repeatedly claims towards industry standards and final concessions, but their bids do not show a tangible increase in utility to me. My current strategy will be to maintain high-utility values in issues of higher importance (A to D), making small concessions on issues of lower importance (E and F) to signal some flexibility while maximizing my utility during the early negotiation phase.
